title: Goth leshbian
description: Gothic and lesbian texture pack made by pyxal for mommywolfy
body:
This is the result of uzi asking me for a texture pack with her only indications being 'goth lesbian'
It changes mostly just GUI's (lesbian and gothic style) and three items (neth and dia sword as well as totem) and a language for the funsies
Will probably not update it much unless she wants me to add anything
Generally this is a pack for fun so don't expect high levels of polish
